🎈 AIDEFEND™ for Kids 🛡️

Join us to protect our AI friends!

🌍 Why do we need to protect computers?

Hello, future Cyber Defender!

AI (Artificial Intelligence) is like a super-smart robot brain we invented. It can chat with us, help us draw, and even help doctors heal people or astronauts fly rockets!

But out in the internet wild, there are sneaky "Computer Monsters" and thieves who want to trick the AI, steal secrets from grown-ups, or break our AI friend to do bad things.

That is why we need "Cyber Heroes (That's YOU!)" to step up! Cybersecurity is all about learning how to use the strongest magical shields to protect our glowing screens from bullies.

Are you ready to learn the magic of defense? Let's see the 7 ultimate moves the world's best experts use! 👇

▼
